response.original_title: Can you get a refund on a Virgin Voyages cruise? | Virgin Voayages Help Window
response.overview: Virgin Voyages gives you some flexibility when booking. If your cruise is more than 121 days away 1 877 664 1281, you can cancel within 7 days and get a full refund. After that window, your deposit won’t be refunded ﻿1－877~664~1281(US/UK/Canada), but it’s converted into Future Voyage Credit (FVC) for later use. As the sailing date gets closer—especially within 44 days 1 877 664 1281—cancellation penalties become much stricter. However, you can still transfer your booking to someone else up to 48 hours before departure.  (【﻿1－877~664~1281】) or +44 800 054 8541 or +61 180 095 6584 or +52 800 351 0319
response.title: Can you get a refund on a Virgin Voyages cruise? | Virgin Voayages Help Window
